description: Durable workflow runtime kernel backed by pibo-workflows.sqlite with boundary persistence, replay/resume, leases, retries, cancellation, checkpoints, and inspectable facts.

userStories.title: Create workflow-specific SQLite store schema
userStories.description: As a runtime engineer, I want a separate workflow store so that normal session stores remain unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Create pibo-workflows.sqlite or equivalent configured store for workflow execution facts only
Add logical tables for definition snapshots, runs, events, node attempts, edge transfers, checkpoints, wakeups, wait tokens, and human actions
Do not duplicate full Pibo/Pi transcripts, spans, tool calls, or session records into the workflow DB
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist workflow run lifecycle boundaries
userStories.description: As an operator, I want completed, failed, waiting, retry-scheduled, and cancelled runs inspectable from persisted records.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow statuses include pending, running, waiting, failed, completed, and cancelled
Runtime persists workflow start, failure, cancellation, checkpoint, and completion events/facts
Inspection reconstructs current workflow status from persisted workflow facts
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement node attempts and boundary events
userStories.description: As a developer, I want node attempts to be first-class so that retries and idempotency are testable.
acceptanceCriteria: Node attempt statuses include pending, leased, running, waiting, retry_scheduled, failed, completed, skipped, and cancelled or equivalent persisted/projection representation for skipped
Runtime persists node attempt start, node attempt result, and error details
Node attempts use deterministic idempotency keys derived from run id, namespace/path, node id, attempt number, and loop iteration where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement durable execution loop and rehydration
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want workflow resume after restart so that completed node work is not re-run.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime executes only compiled plans

Execution loop claims runnable work, loads state/checkpoint, leases attempts, executes nodes, validates output, persists results, applies state, evaluates edges, creates transfers, enqueues next attempts, checkpoints, and emits events
Kernel rehydrates from run, latest checkpoint, node attempts, edge transfers, wakeups, and wait tokens without requiring XState snapshots
Crash tests cover restart after workflow start, node completion, edge transfer, wait token creation, retry scheduling, and workflow completion
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement leases and stale lease reclaim
userStories.description: As a runtime engineer, I want leases to prevent duplicate active ownership so that two workers do not run the same attempt.
acceptanceCriteria: Runnable selection requires no active lease owned by another worker
Leases include leaseId, ownerId, acquiredAt, and expiresAt
Long-running attempts heartbeat when supported and expired leases are reclaimable
Lease tests cover active exclusion, heartbeat update, stale reclaim, and idempotent retry boundary
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement retries, wakeups, and durable backoff
userStories.description: As an operator, I want retry backoff and wakeups to survive restart so that long-running workflows continue correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Retry policies support fixed, linear, exponential, and none or accepted equivalents
Retry inheritance order is node/adapter policy, then workflow policy, then system default
Wakeups store kind, available time, correlation id, payload, and run/attempt linkage
Restart tests cover retry-scheduled runs and wakeup resume
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement cancellation propagation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want cancellation to stop active work and child runs so that workflow shutdown is auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Cancellation propagates to active attempts, child Pibo Sessions when allowed, and nested workflow runs
Runtime records cancellation event and final cancelled status
Cancellation does not bypass environment or isolation policies
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
